story: Waka Waka is the benchmark evergreen page for this site: users return to it every tournament because they remember the song before they remember the exact tournament metadata. The behind-the-song angle is the mix of a global pop star, South African band Freshlyground, and a host-country tournament that made the official song feel tied to place rather than only to FIFA branding.
